title: DefenseClaw OTEL Metrics
description: DefenseClaw OTel metric contract. The x-emitted-metrics catalog is exhaustive for instruments declared by internal/telemetry/metrics.go; grouped properties below carry curated dashboard metadata and attribute dimensions for the primary public surfaces.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.activity.diff_entries
x-emitted-metrics.description: Number of diff entries per EventActivity

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.activity.total
x-emitted-metrics.description: Operator mutations recorded (EventActivity)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.admission.decisions
x-emitted-metrics.description: Admission gate decisions

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.agent.discovery.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: Wall-clock duration of the CLI local agent discovery scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.agent.discovery.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Version probe or discovery errors by connector and bounded reason.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.agent.discovery.installed
x-emitted-metrics.description: Latest discovered installed state for each connector (1 installed, 0 not installed).

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.agent.discovery.runs
x-emitted-metrics.description: On-demand local agent discovery reports accepted by the sidecar, by source/cache/result.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.agent.discovery.signals
x-emitted-metrics.description: Per-connector install signals reported by agent discovery.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.components.installs
x-emitted-metrics.description: Distinct install evidences per component as of the last scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.components.observations
x-emitted-metrics.description: Per-(ecosystem,name) confidence emissions; one increment per scan that produced a component rollup.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.components.workspaces
x-emitted-metrics.description: Distinct workspaces a component appears in as of the last scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.confidence.identity_score
x-emitted-metrics.description: Two-axis Bayesian engine identity score in [0,1] per component, per scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.confidence.presence_score
x-emitted-metrics.description: Two-axis Bayesian engine presence score in [0,1] per component, per scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.active_signals
x-emitted-metrics.description: Latest active AI usage signal count.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.dedupe_suppressed
x-emitted-metrics.description: Duplicate AI discovery signals suppressed within a scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: Wall-clock duration of continuous AI discovery scans.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Continuous AI discovery detector errors by bounded detector/reason.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.files_scanned
x-emitted-metrics.description: Package manifest and shell history files inspected by continuous AI discovery.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.gone_signals
x-emitted-metrics.description: AI usage signals that disappeared from a full scan.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.new_signals
x-emitted-metrics.description: New or changed AI usage signals discovered.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.runs
x-emitted-metrics.description: Continuous AI discovery scans completed by the sidecar.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.ai.discovery.signals
x-emitted-metrics.description: AI usage signals observed by category/vendor/product/state.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.alert.count
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total runtime alerts emitted

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.approval.count
x-emitted-metrics.description: Exec approval requests processed

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.db.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite audit store operation failures

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.events.total
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total audit events persisted

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.sink.batches.delivered
x-emitted-metrics.description: Audit sink batches acknowledged by remote

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.sink.batches.dropped
x-emitted-metrics.description: Audit sink batches dropped due to queue or circuit breaker

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.sink.circuit.state
x-emitted-metrics.description: Audit sink circuit breaker state (0=closed, 1=open, 2=half-open)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.sink.delivery.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Audit sink per-batch delivery latency

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.sink.failures
x-emitted-metrics.description: Audit sink send failures by sink kind

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.audit.sink.queue.depth
x-emitted-metrics.description: Audit sink in-memory queue depth

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.cisco.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Cisco AI Defense inspect errors by code

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.cisco_inspect.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Cisco AI Defense HTTP inspect round-trip latency

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.codex.notify
x-emitted-metrics.description: Codex notify events received via the notify-bridge shim, labelled by type/status

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.codex.notify.malformed
x-emitted-metrics.description: Codex notify payloads that failed to parse

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.config.load.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Configuration load or validation errors

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.invocations
x-emitted-metrics.description: Connector hook invocations observed by the gateway.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Connector hook handler latency.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.outcome
x-emitted-metrics.description: Connector hook outcomes labelled by action, severity, and would_block.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.tokens
x-emitted-metrics.description: Token usage attributable to connector hook invocations. Split by kind=prompt|completion|total.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.unified_dispatch
x-emitted-metrics.description: Count of hook invocations routed through the unified hook collector, by connector.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.egress.events
x-emitted-metrics.description: Egress requests classified by Layer 1 shape detection (branch=known|shape|passthrough)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Structured gateway errors by subsystem/code

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.events.emitted
x-emitted-metrics.description: Gateway events written through the writer choke point

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.forwarded_headers
x-emitted-metrics.description: Inbound HTTP headers forwarded from the agent to the upstream LLM provider (path=chat-completions|passthrough, result=ok|rejected_invalid|rejected_overflow)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.judge.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: LLM judge errors (provider, parse, or empty response)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.judge.invocations
x-emitted-metrics.description: LLM judge invocations by kind/action

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.judge.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: LLM judge invocation latency

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.gateway.verdicts
x-emitted-metrics.description: Guardrail verdicts emitted per stage/action/severity

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.guardrail.cache.hits
x-emitted-metrics.description: Verdict cache hits by scanner/verdict/TTL bucket

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.guardrail.cache.misses
x-emitted-metrics.description: Verdict cache misses by scanner/verdict/TTL bucket

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.guardrail.evaluations
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total guardrail evaluations performed

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.guardrail.judge.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: LLM judge invocation latency (cache miss path includes model round-trip)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.guardrail.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Guardrail evaluation latency distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.http.auth.failures
x-emitted-metrics.description: HTTP authentication failures by route + reason

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.http.rate_limit.breaches
x-emitted-metrics.description: HTTP rate limit breaches by route

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.http.request.count
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total HTTP requests to the sidecar API

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.http.request.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: HTTP request duration distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.inspect.evaluations
x-emitted-metrics.description: Tool/message inspect evaluations

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.inspect.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Tool/message inspect latency distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.judge.persist.batch_size
x-emitted-metrics.description: Rows committed per judge-persistence transaction

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.judge.persist.drops
x-emitted-metrics.description: Judge bodies dropped before persistence (queue full)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.judge.persist.queue_depth
x-emitted-metrics.description: Current depth of the async judge-persistence queue

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.judge.semaphore.depth
x-emitted-metrics.description: Judge concurrency semaphore: slots currently held

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.judge.semaphore.drops
x-emitted-metrics.description: Judge semaphore drops (queue full)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.llm_bridge.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: LiteLLM bridge call latency (Python subprocess)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.openshell.exit
x-emitted-metrics.description: OpenShell subprocess exits by command and exit code

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.bytes
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total OTLP body bytes received by the connector ingest receiver, by signal/source

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.last_seen_ts
x-emitted-metrics.description: Unix-seconds timestamp of the most recent OTLP-HTTP batch accepted from a given source/signal. Used by the ConnectorTelemetrySilent alert.

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.malformed
x-emitted-metrics.description: OTLP-JSON bodies that failed to parse, by signal/source

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.records
x-emitted-metrics.description: Leaf records (logRecords|dataPoints|spans) extracted from inbound OTLP-JSON batches by signal/source

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.requests
x-emitted-metrics.description: OTLP-HTTP requests accepted by the connector ingest receiver, by signal/source/result

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.panics.total
x-emitted-metrics.description: Recovered panics by subsystem

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.policy.evaluations
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total OPA policy evaluations per domain

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.policy.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: OPA policy evaluation latency distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.policy.reloads
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total OPA policy reload events

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.process.uptime_seconds
x-emitted-metrics.description: Sidecar process uptime

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.provenance.bumps
x-emitted-metrics.description: Monotonic provenance generation bumps

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.quarantine.actions
x-emitted-metrics.description: Filesystem quarantine and restore operations

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.queue.depth
x-emitted-metrics.description: Current depth of a buffered queue

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.queue.drops
x-emitted-metrics.description: Events dropped due to full queue or backpressure

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.redaction.applied
x-emitted-metrics.description: Guardrail/egress redactions applied by detector/field

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.runtime.fd.in_use
x-emitted-metrics.description: File descriptors currently held by the sidecar

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.runtime.gc.pause
x-emitted-metrics.description: Go GC pause sample (P99 of recent pauses per tick)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.runtime.goroutines
x-emitted-metrics.description: Current goroutine count

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.runtime.heap.alloc
x-emitted-metrics.description: Current heap allocation in bytes

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.runtime.heap.objects
x-emitted-metrics.description: Live heap objects (runtime.MemStats.HeapObjects)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scan.count
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total number of scans completed

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scan.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: Scan duration distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scan.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Scanner invocations that failed (crash, timeout, not found)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scan.findings
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total findings across all scans

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scan.findings.by_rule
x-emitted-metrics.description: Findings grouped by scanner + rule_id + severity

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scan.findings.gauge
x-emitted-metrics.description: Current open finding count

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.scanner.queue.depth
x-emitted-metrics.description: Pending scanner jobs queued ahead of execution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.schema.violations
x-emitted-metrics.description: Gateway events dropped by the runtime JSON-schema gate (v7)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.slo.block.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Admission-block enforcement latency (SLO target: < 2000ms)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.slo.tui.refresh
x-emitted-metrics.description: TUI panel refresh latency (SLO target: < 5000ms)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.sqlite.busy_retries
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite SQLITE_BUSY events by operation

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.sqlite.checkpoint.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(PASSIVE) duration

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.sqlite.db.bytes
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite main database file size

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.sqlite.freelist_count
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite PRAGMA freelist_count

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.sqlite.page_count
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite PRAGMA page_count

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.sqlite.wal.bytes
x-emitted-metrics.description: SQLite WAL file size

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.stream.bytes_sent
x-emitted-metrics.description: Bytes sent on an SSE/stream before close

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.stream.duration_ms
x-emitted-metrics.description: Wall-clock duration of an SSE/stream from open to close

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.stream.lifecycle
x-emitted-metrics.description: SSE/stream lifecycle transitions (open/close) per route/outcome

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.telemetry.exporter.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: OTel exporter or SDK errors by signal

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.telemetry.exporter.last_export_ts
x-emitted-metrics.description: Unix seconds of last successful metric export

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.tool.calls
x-emitted-metrics.description: Total tool calls observed

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.tool.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: Tool call duration distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.tool.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Tool calls that returned non-zero exit codes

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.tui.filter.applied
x-emitted-metrics.description: TUI panel filter applications (operator changed a filter chip or search)

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.watcher.errors
x-emitted-metrics.description: Filesystem watcher errors

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.watcher.events
x-emitted-metrics.description: Filesystem watcher events observed

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.watcher.restarts
x-emitted-metrics.description: Watcher or gateway reconnection events

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.webhook.circuit_breaker
x-emitted-metrics.description: Webhook circuit breaker open/close transitions

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.webhook.cooldown.suppressed
x-emitted-metrics.description: Webhook dispatches suppressed by per-endpoint cooldown

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.webhook.dispatches
x-emitted-metrics.description: Webhook dispatches attempted by webhook kind

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.webhook.failures
x-emitted-metrics.description: Webhook dispatch failures by webhook kind + reason

x-emitted-metrics.name: defenseclaw.webhook.latency
x-emitted-metrics.description: Webhook dispatch latency distribution

x-emitted-metrics.name: gen_ai.client.operation.duration
x-emitted-metrics.description: GenAI operation duration.

x-emitted-metrics.name: gen_ai.client.token.usage
x-emitted-metrics.description: Number of input and output tokens used.

runtime_metrics.description: Metrics related to runtime tool and LLM calls.

default.name: defenseclaw.tool.errors
default.description: Tool calls that returned non-zero exit codes.

connector_metrics.description: Metrics related to connector hook requests, native OTLP ingest, and notify bridge traffic.

default.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.invocations
default.description: Connector hook invocations observed by the gateway, including rejected requests.

default.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.tokens
default.description: Token usage attributable to connector hook invocations.

default.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.outcome
default.description: Connector hook outcomes labelled by bounded event/action/severity dimensions.

default.name: defenseclaw.connector.hook.unified_dispatch
default.description: Connector hook invocations routed through the unified hook collector.

default.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.requests
default.description: Native connector OTLP-HTTP batches received by the gateway.

default.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.records
default.description: Native connector OTLP leaf records extracted from accepted batches.

default.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.bytes
default.description: Native connector OTLP request-body bytes received by the gateway.

default.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.malformed
default.description: Native connector OTLP batches that failed payload normalization or summary parsing.

default.name: defenseclaw.otel.ingest.last_seen_ts
default.description: Unix seconds timestamp of the last native connector OTLP batch.

default.name: defenseclaw.codex.notify
default.description: Codex notify bridge events received by the gateway.

default.name: defenseclaw.codex.notify.malformed
default.description: Codex notify payloads that failed JSON parsing.

alert_metrics.description: Metrics related to runtime alerts and guardrail evaluations.

policy_metrics.description: Metrics related to OPA policy evaluation across all domains.

default.name: defenseclaw.policy.evaluations
default.description: Total OPA policy evaluations per domain.

policy.verdict.description: Verdict returned by the policy evaluation.

process_metrics.description: Metrics related to gateway process health and recovered failure paths.
